query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bookkeeping_accounts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  account_code VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  account_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  account_type ENUM('asset','liability','equity','revenue','expense') NOT NULL,
  parent_account_id INT,
  description TEXT,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  balance DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  subsidiary VARCHAR(255),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bookkeeping_journal_entries (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  entry_number VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  entry_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  description TEXT NOT NULL,
  reference VARCHAR(255),
  status ENUM('draft','posted','voided') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  created_by INT,
  approved_by INT,
  total_debit DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  total_credit DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  subsidiary VARCHAR(255),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bookkeeping_ledger_lines (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  journal_entry_id INT NOT NULL,
  account_id INT NOT NULL,
  debit DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  credit DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  memo TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS hr_employees (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  employee_number VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  first_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  last_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(320),
  phone VARCHAR(20),
  title VARCHAR(255),
  department_id INT,
  subsidiary VARCHAR(255),
  hire_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  termination_date TIMESTAMP NULL,
  status ENUM('active','on_leave','terminated','retired') DEFAULT 'active' NOT NULL,
  employment_type ENUM('full_time','part_time','contractor','intern') DEFAULT 'full_time' NOT NULL,
  salary DECIMAL(12,2),
  pay_frequency ENUM('weekly','biweekly','monthly','annual') DEFAULT 'biweekly' NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS hr_departments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  code VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  subsidiary VARCHAR(255),
  manager_id INT,
  description TEXT,
  budget DECIMAL(15,2),
  headcount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS hr_time_tracking (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  employee_id INT NOT NULL,
  date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  hours_worked DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL,
  overtime DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  project_code VARCHAR(50),
  notes TEXT,
  status ENUM('pending','approved','rejected') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS hr_payroll (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  employee_id INT NOT NULL,
  pay_period_start TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  pay_period_end TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  gross_pay DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,
  deductions DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  net_pay DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,
  tax_withheld DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending','processed','paid','voided') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  paid_date TIMESTAMP NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS accounting_invoices (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  invoice_number VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  type ENUM('receivable','payable') NOT NULL,
  client_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  client_email VARCHAR(320),
  issue_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  due_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  subtotal DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  tax DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  total DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  amount_paid DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('draft','sent','paid','partial','overdue','cancelled','void') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  subsidiary VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  line_items JSON,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS accounting_payments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  invoice_id INT,
  payment_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  amount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  method ENUM('cash','check','wire','ach','credit_card','stripe','paypal','other') DEFAULT 'stripe' NOT NULL,
  reference VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  status ENUM('pending','completed','failed','refunded') DEFAULT 'completed' NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS accounting_reconciliation (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  account_id INT NOT NULL,
  reconciliation_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  statement_balance DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  book_balance DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  difference DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('in_progress','completed','discrepancy') DEFAULT 'in_progress' NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  reconciled_by INT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS legal_contracts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  contract_number VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  contract_type ENUM('artist_agreement','licensing','nda','employment','vendor','distribution','publishing','sponsorship','partnership','other') NOT NULL,
  counterparty VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('draft','review','approved','active','expired','terminated','disputed') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  start_date TIMESTAMP NULL,
  end_date TIMESTAMP NULL,
  value DECIMAL(15,2),
  subsidiary VARCHAR(255),
  description TEXT,
  terms TEXT,
  assigned_to INT,
  approved_by INT,
  document_url VARCHAR(500),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS legal_intellectual_property (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  ip_type ENUM('copyright','trademark','patent','trade_secret','licensing_right','masters','publishing_right') NOT NULL,
  registration_number VARCHAR(100),
  owner VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending','registered','active','expired','disputed','transferred') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  filing_date TIMESTAMP NULL,
  expiration_date TIMESTAMP NULL,
  description TEXT,
  subsidiary VARCHAR(255),
  value DECIMAL(15,2),
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS legal_compliance_items (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  category ENUM('fcc','copyright','gdpr','ccpa','ada','tax','employment_law','broadcast_license','other') NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('compliant','non_compliant','pending_review','in_progress','waived') DEFAULT 'pending_review' NOT NULL,
  due_date TIMESTAMP NULL,
  assigned_to INT,
  description TEXT,
  resolution TEXT,
  subsidiary VARCHAR(255),
  priority ENUM('low','medium','high','critical') DEFAULT 'medium' NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
